question: Which text appears under the 'Related Videos:' heading on the end card? A. Kabocha Squash Dessert Recipe B. Pad Faktong C. Kabocha Squash Stir-Fry D. Hot Thai Kitchen
How many text labels are visible on the stovetop control panel in the shot showing the spatula and oil?
What color is the sleeveless top worn by the woman tasting the dish?
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A white square bowl holds stir-fried orange kabocha squash chunks with green skin, scrambled egg pieces, and fresh green basil leaves. A person uses a silver spoon to transfer cooked food from a metal pan onto a wooden cutting board. Minced yellow garlic fries in clear oil at the bottom of a silver metal wok on a black stovetop. A woman wearing a green sleeveless top eats a spoonful of the dish.

question: How many pink bowls are visible?

Which of the previously seen people is back on screen? A. Person's hand with fair skin pouring clear liquid from a glass measuring cup B. Person's hand wearing a silver wristwatch with a metal link band C. Woman with long dark hair in a ponytail, wearing a dark green sleeveless top D. Person's hand with light skin tone pouring dark liquid from a small white bowl

The logo says 'Kabocha Squash Stir-Fry' and elephant magnets are on the fridge. C. The logo says 'Hot Thai Kitchen' and framed pictures are on the fridge. D. The logo says 'Kabocha Squash Stir-Fry' and framed pictures are on the fridge.

Describe the sequence of actions involving the dish and cooking process shown in the video.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a title card displays the finished Pad Faktong dish; at 8s, a person transfers stir-fry from a pan to a white bowl; at 10s, fresh basil leaves are placed on top as garnish; at 12s, a woman eats a spoonful of the food; at 14s, oil is poured into a silver wok.

What fresh herb will be added as a garnish to the finished dish?
canonical_answer: Fresh green basil leaves are arranged on top of the stir-fry in the white bowl.
